title: vandellia tectanthera
intro: Vandellia tectanthera is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Loranthaceae and is commonly known as the 'Vandellia'. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Vandellia tectanthera include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
